rationale: Gov't Code §2303.051 governs enterprise zone designation and bank duties. It is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 2303.051. GENERAL POWERS AND DUTIES. (a) The bank shall administer and monitor the implementation of this chapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns enterprise zones, not property tax homestead exemptions.
